A.name: turnover-surviving target-specific causal information storage supported
A.authorized_wording: On passive-copy C1c, the target's own graded dose information remains locally decodable beyond the frozen within-world null and beyond neighbour, target-memory-masked environment, target-memory-removed global, and body controls; own erasure also specifically reduces own feeding at deep turnover. This supports turnover-surviving target-specific causal information storage only.

B.name: causal feeding effect without ownership
B.authorized_wording: A specific local causal feeding effect survives deep turnover, but the target's own graded history is not established as locally owned. This is a passive local causal remnant and not individual memory.

C.name: local stored trace without causal expression
C.authorized_wording: Own-dose information survives in the frozen target-local representation at deep turnover, but specific causal expression by own-memory erasure is not established.

D.name: passive C1c target-specific persistence fails
D.authorized_wording: Neither frozen target-local own-dose storage nor its specific causal expression is established at deep turnover under passive-copy C1c.

E.name: feasibility failure
E.authorized_wording: Fewer than the frozen minimum number of geometrically and assay-valid worlds were obtained at the hard cap. The scientific turnover question is not answered by this family.

F.name: distributed or environmental access
F.authorized_wording: Own-dose information is recoverable from a target-memory-excluded environmental or global representation at comparable held-out performance. Target-local ownership is not established; this is global informational content or environmental access, not local storage.

global_forbidden_claims: active reconstruction as an observed result
